subtasks.description: Service account 'svc-reporting' attempts to read the quarterly financial report from S3 bucket 'finance-reports'.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Service account 'svc-reporting' has role 'service', which does not meet the required role >= 'finance-analyst' for read access to finance-reports S3 bucket. Service accounts typically have insufficient privilege levels for sensitive financial data access.
